entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The host crop used in the study for managing Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pest insect targeting chickpea crops.

entities.name: NPV
entities.description: Nucleopolyhedrovirus used as a biological control agent against Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: QUINALPHOS
entities.description: A chemical insecticide used to control Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of the chickpea genotype to resist attack by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: ICC 506
entities.description: A specific resistant genotype of chickpea.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the chickpea genotypes measured under different treatments.

entities.name: CHEMICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of chemical agents to manage pests.
